'Ndrina Di Giovine.description: A 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, with branches in Milan and the United States. Involved in drug and arms trafficking. Notable for the prominent role of women, particularly Maria Serraino, who led the clan's heroin trafficking operations in Milan in the 1970s-80s.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Di Giovine is a sub-group of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Di Giovine è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: The Di Giovine collaborated with the Morabito clan to buy heroin from Syria.
edges.evidence_quote: i Di Giovine in collaborazione con la cosca dei Morabito comprarono eroina dalla Siria

descriptions: The Di Giovine collaborated with the Gallo Camorra clan to import drugs.
edges.evidence_quote: L'importazione di sostanze stupefacenti avviene in collaborazione con il clan camorrista dei Gallo di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: Serraino and Di Giovine were jointly involved in drug trafficking operations in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: Serraino was involved together with Di Giovine in operations Belgio 1, 2, and 3 in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gate 13

Latin Eagles.description: The Latin Eagles are a Puerto Rican street gang founded in Chicago, Illinois in 1964. Originally formed as a club to protect against white greaser gangs, it evolved into a criminal organization. The gang is aligned with the Folk Nation and has been involved in territorial disputes with rival gangs such as the Latin Kings and Gangster Disciples. It is still active as of the present.

descriptions: Latin Eagles is an affiliated gang of Folk Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliated gangs include: - Latin Eagles

descriptions: Latin Eagles allied with Ashland Vikings in the Folks alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples, Simon City Royals, Ashland Vikings, Latin Disciples and others in 1978.

descriptions: Latin Eagles are allied with Folk Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation

descriptions: Latin Eagles are rivals of Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Latin Eagles went to war with Gangster Disciples in 1995.
edges.evidence_quote: A war involving the Latin Eagles and the Gangster Disciples started in the summer of 1995 as SGD's moved into the hood

descriptions: Latin Eagles joined the Folks alliance alongside Black Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Latin Eagles fought Harrison Gents for control of Lakeview High School, resulting in a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles, Latin Kings and Harrison Gents all fought for control of Lakeview High School during this time, which ended with a Latin Eagle murdering a Gent leader in 1966

descriptions: Latin Eagles allied with Imperial Gangsters in the Almighty Folks Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: During the mid-1990s, the Almighty Latin Eagles formed an alliance with the Almighty Imperial Gangsters and Simon City Royals as the Almighty Folks Familia.

descriptions: Latin Eagles and Latin Kings are mortal enemies over turf.
edges.evidence_quote: disputes over Northside turf made the Latin Eagles mortal enemies with the Latin Kings

edges.evidence_quote: By the end of the decade they would go into a permanent bloody war with the Insane Familia led by the Spanish Cobras and the Maniac Famila ran by the Maniac Latin Disciples.

Almighty Gaylords Nation.description: Chicago street gang founded in 1952, part of the People Nation alliance. Initially composed mostly of Italians and some Mexican Americans, it became known as Chicago's largest white street gang. Active in extortion, assault, and murder, with territory across multiple states. Still active as of the article's last update.

White Tigers.description: The White Tigers were a Chinese American street gang based in New York City, primarily active in Flushing, Queens, and northern Chinatown from the early 1980s to the mid 1990s. Formed in 1980 by immigrants from China and American-born Chinese, they engaged in extortion, kidnapping, illegal gambling, racketeering, drug trafficking, human trafficking, arson, and murder. The gang was involved in turf wars with rivals like the Green Dragons and had an estimated membership of 10 to 50 members.

descriptions: MOD overtook the White Tigers.
edges.evidence_quote: In the Midwest, one of Minnesota's first Hmong gang known as the White Tigers was eventually overtaken by MOD's presence in the Twin Cities.

descriptions: Ghost Shadows allowed White Tigers to operate in their territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The White Tigers did have territory in upper Chinatown in Manhattan, on Mott Street, with permission from the Ghost Shadows

descriptions: White Tigers fought turf wars with Green Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the 80s, the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Queens gangs, such as the younger Green Dragons.

descriptions: Combatant faction succeeded Shining Path.

descriptions: Pemuda Pancasila and Front Pembela Islam are different types of preman organizations, with Pemuda Pancasila being nationalist and Front Pembela Islam being religious-based.
edges.evidence_quote: While organizations such as the Patriot Party (Pemuda Pancasila) continue to portray themselves as defenders of national unity, the new breed organized themselves along post-Pancasila ethnic and religious lines. This new breed includes the Betawi Brotherhood Forum and Front Pembela Islam.
